entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum L. (R.) Br., the crop studied for heterosis prediction

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superiority of hybrid offspring over their parents in terms of specific traits

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by the pearl millet hybrids

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of stover produced by the pearl millet hybrids

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC TRAITS
entities.description: Observable physical characteristics used to calculate genetic distance

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA-based markers used to assess genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: The measure of genetic divergence between hybrid parents

entities.name: EUCLIDEAN DISTANCE
entities.description: A method used to calculate phenotypic distance (ED)

entities.name: SIMPLE MATCHING DISTANCE
entities.description: A method used to calculate molecular distance (SM)

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used as molecular markers to evaluate genetic distance

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DISTANCE
entities.description: Distance between parents based on phenotypic traits

entities.name: MOLECULAR DISTANCE
entities.description: Distance between parents based on molecular markers

relationships.description: Study focuses on predicting heterosis in pearl millet
Grain yield is a trait evaluated in pearl millet
Stover yield is a trait evaluated in pearl millet
Phenotypic distance is derived from phenotypic traits
Molecular distance is derived from molecular markers
SSRs are used as molecular markers
Euclidean distance is the method used to calculate phenotypic distance
Simple matching distance is the method used to calculate molecular distance
Phenotypic distance is a predictor of heterosis
Molecular distance was investigated as a predictor of heterosis but showed low correlation
Correlation was investigated between phenotypic and molecular distance
Heterosis is measured for grain yield
Heterosis is measured for stover yield
